---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Use case

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the concrete scenario where you would use it.

## Proposed solution

What would you like Sahara to do? If you have a specific API or CLI in mind, sketch it out:

```bash
sahara <proposed command> ...
```

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds or alternatives have you tried? Why are they insufficient?

## Roadmap alignment

Which phase of the [roadmap](../../ROADMAP.md) does this relate to?

- [ ] v0.3 (hybrid retrieval, entity extraction, OCR plugin)
- [ ] v0.4+ (image search, audio/video, plugin marketplace)
- [ ] Something not on the roadmap (explain why it belongs)

## Willingness to implement

- [ ] I would like to implement this myself and submit a PR
- [ ] I can help test an implementation
- [ ] I am requesting this for someone else to implement
